analysis.name: Smooth Love Potion
analysis.summary: SLP 24小时涨幅约13%，但基本面疲软，供应量巨大且无上限，价格距历史高点跌超99%。近期无重大利好，上涨可能为短期资金博弈，风险极高。
catalysts: 无明确近期催化剂，可能为市场情绪或小资金推动

Axie Infinity Reduces SLP Emissions to Prevent 'Collapse' - CoinDesk
latestNews.reason: 减少排放有助于控制供应，但该新闻发布于2022年，已过时

fundamentals: SLP是Axie Infinity游戏内的繁殖代币，通过游戏赚取
总供应量约363亿枚，无最大供应量上限，通胀压力大
市值约1851万美元，24小时交易量约1825万美元，换手率高
价格距历史高点0.3997美元跌超99.87%
marketRead: 24小时涨幅12.88%，但成交量/市值比接近1，表明交易活跃但可能为短期投机
DEX流动性约994万美元，但交易量仅0.21美元（疑似数据异常），实际交易可能主要在CEX
risks: 供应量巨大且无上限，通胀压力持续
游戏热度下降，Axie Infinity用户流失严重
价格长期低迷，缺乏新资金入场
DEX流动性数据异常，可能存在操纵风险
新闻均为旧闻，无近期利好支撑
watchlist: Axie Infinity游戏更新或用户增长数据
大额持仓变动或交易所上线
sourceNotes: DEX交易量数据异常（0.21美元），可能不准确，实际交易量可能来自CEX
新闻多为2021-2022年旧闻，缺乏近期信息

profile.name: Smooth Love Potion
profile.description: Smooth Love Potion (SLP) tokens can be earned as rewards by Axie Infinity players through battle or adventure mode. SLP are tokens that can be used to breed new digital pets, known as Axies. It was formally known as Small Love Potion before the token upgrade to the Ronin blockchain. The cost of breeding begins at 100 SLP but increases gradually — rising to 200 SLP for the second breed, 300 for the third, 500 for the fourth, 800 for the fifth, and 1,300 for the sixth. Axies can be bred a maximum of seven times, and the seventh breed costs 2,100 SLP. This limit exists in order to prevent hyperinflation in the marketplace. SLP paves the way to the concept of Play-to-earn which popularizes the Axie Infinity games among players who are looking to earn some money or participate in DeFi. It is especially popular in countries like Philippines.
